title: codereview: inconsistent struct init in gateway_config reject tests
description: Some reject tests declare struct lichen_gateway_config_update update; without = {0} while others do. The bytes test and new too_long use init, the invalid_manual_location does not. Minor but for consistency and to avoid uninit warnings in some builds. Fixed in test. Tagged codereview. Linked to project-LICHEN-gdyd
close_reason: Added = { 0 } initializer to struct in test_decode_rejects_invalid_manual_location for consistency with other reject tests in the same file. P4 fixed as real work per instructions. Part of codereview for project-LICHEN-gdyd
